title: PRIMA HOUSEWARES Wooden Shoe Boot Trainer Rack Storage Shelf Organiser Stand Unit - Natural - 2 Tier
features: Easy and quick assembly, no tools required.

description: Optimize your space with our Wooden Shoe Rack, an ideal solution for keeping your footwear neatly organized. Crafted from robust and durable wood, this shoe rack ensures long-lasting functionality while adding a touch of elegance to your home. Key Features: Space-Saving Design: Perfect for maximizing storage in compact areas. Durable Wooden Construction: Built to last with high-quality wood, offering stability and strength. Effortless Assembly: Easy and quick to set up with no tools required. 2-Tier Structure: Measuring W74cm x H29.5cm x D26.5cm, it provides ample storage without occupying too much space. Keep your shoes organized and your home tidy with this practical and stylish wooden shoe rack.
